+            "pct": _rate(returned_users, len(matured_active_dates)),
         })
 
-    today = now.date()
     dau_series = []
     for offset in range(29, -1, -1):
         day = today - timedelta(days=offset)
@@ -562,7 +582,6 @@
         feedback = metadata.get("cancel_feedback") or metadata.get("feedback")
     return {
         "id": str(_row_value(row, "id")),
-        "user_id": str(_row_value(row, "user_id")),
         "from_plan": str(_row_value(row, "from_plan") or ""),
         "to_plan": str(_row_value(row, "to_plan") or ""),
         "reason": str(reason) if reason else None,
@@ -571,6 +590,77 @@
     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1
 
     reason_buckets = [
         {
@@ -1573,7 +1665,7 @@

+
+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

+    assert may_4_cohort["retention"][1] == {
+        "week_offset": 1,
+        "active_users": 1,
+        "pct": 0.5,
+        "is_complete": True,
+    }
+

+    assert current_cohort["retention"][1] == {
+        "week_offset": 1,

+        "pct": None,
+        "is_complete": False,

     curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
     assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 3
@@ -86,3 +106,55 @@
     assert doc_segments["large"]["users"] == 1
 
     assert payload["dau_wau_mau"]["mau"] == 2
+
+
+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7a2b7c339e4c8ecf19c0b7fdf410930e7bd0660d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/backend/alembic/versions/20260524_0031_add_messages_role_created_session_index.py

+"""add messages role-created-session index
+
+Revision ID: 20260524_0031
+Revises: 20260514_0030
+Create Date: 2026-05-24
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:
+    op.drop_index("idx_messages_role_created_session", table_name="messages")

 EXPORT_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(export|download|csv|excel|xlsx)\b|导出|下载|表格文件", re.IGNORECASE)
 PAGE_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(page|p\.\s*\d+|page\s+\d+)\b|第\s*\d+\s*页|页面", re.IGNORECASE)
@@ -234,6 +235,10 @@
     return day - timedelta(days=day.weekday())
 
 
+def _utc_day_trunc(column: Any) -> Any:
+    return func.date_trunc("day", column.op("AT TIME ZONE")("UTC"))
+
+
 def _admin_excluded_emails(admin_emails: set[str] | None = None) -> set[str]:
     if admin_emails is not None:
         return {email.strip().lower() for email in admin_emails if email and email.strip()}

             target_week = cohort_week + timedelta(weeks=week_offset)
+            is_complete = target_week <= today

             active_users = {

@@ -394,22 +410,26 @@

+        maturity_cutoff = today - timedelta(days=days)
         for active_dates in active_dates_by_user.values():
             if not active_dates:
                 continue
             first_active = min(active_dates)

+            matured_active_dates.append(active_dates)
             if any(first_active < active_date <= first_active + timedelta(days=days) for active_date in active_dates):

         curves.append({

             "days": days,

         })

     dau_series = []
     for offset in range(29, -1, -1):
         day = today - timedelta(days=offset)
@@ -562,7 +582,6 @@
         feedback = metadata.get("cancel_feedback") or metadata.get("feedback")
     return {
         "id": str(_row_value(row, "id")),
-        "user_id": str(_row_value(row, "user_id")),
         "from_plan": str(_row_value(row, "from_plan") or ""),
         "to_plan": str(_row_value(row, "to_plan") or ""),
         "reason": str(reason) if reason else None,
@@ -571,6 +590,77 @@
     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1
 
     reason_buckets = [
         {

+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

+
+
+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

+"""add messages role-created-session index
+
+Revision ID: 20260524_0031
+Revises: 20260514_0030
+Create Date: 2026-05-24
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:
+    op.drop_index("idx_messages_role_created_session", table_name="messages")

+def _utc_day_trunc(column: Any) -> Any:
+    return func.date_trunc("day", column.op("AT TIME ZONE")("UTC"))
+
+
 def _admin_excluded_emails(admin_emails: set[str] | None = None) -> set[str]:

             "returned_users": returned_users,
-            "pct": _rate(returned_users, len(activated_user_ids)),
+            "pct": _rate(returned_users, len(matured_active_dates)),
         })

     dau_series = []
     for offset in range(29, -1, -1):
         day = today - timedelta(days=offset)

         feedback = metadata.get("cancel_feedback") or metadata.get("feedback")
     return {
         "id": str(_row_value(row, "id")),
-        "user_id": str(_row_value(row, "user_id")),
         "from_plan": str(_row_value(row, "from_plan") or ""),
         "to_plan": str(_row_value(row, "to_plan") or ""),
         "reason": str(reason) if reason else None,
@@ -571,6 +590,77 @@
     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1
 
     reason_buckets = [
         {
@@ -1573,7 +1665,7 @@
         )
     ).all()

+
+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

@@ -86,3 +106,55 @@
     assert doc_segments["large"]["users"] == 1
 
     assert payload["dau_wau_mau"]["mau"] == 2
+
+
+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7a2b7c339e4c8ecf19c0b7fdf410930e7bd0660d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/backend/alembic/versions/20260524_0031_add_messages_role_created_session_index.py

+"""add messages role-created-session index
+
+Revision ID: 20260524_0031
+Revises: 20260514_0030
+Create Date: 2026-05-24
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:
+    op.drop_index("idx_messages_role_created_session", table_name="messages")

 }
 EXPORT_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(export|download|csv|excel|xlsx)\b|导出|下载|表格文件", re.IGNORECASE)
 PAGE_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(page|p\.\s*\d+|page\s+\d+)\b|第\s*\d+\s*页|页面", re.IGNORECASE)
@@ -234,6 +235,10 @@
     return day - timedelta(days=day.weekday())
 
 
+def _utc_day_trunc(column: Any) -> Any:
+    return func.date_trunc("day", column.op("AT TIME ZONE")("UTC"))
+
+
 def _admin_excluded_emails(admin_emails: set[str] | None = None) -> set[str]:
     if admin_emails is not None:
         return {email.strip().lower() for email in admin_emails if email and email.strip()}

     for cohort_week in cohort_weeks:
         users_in_cohort = cohort_users[cohort_week]
         retention = []
         for week_offset in range(RETENTION_OFFSETS):
             target_week = cohort_week + timedelta(weeks=week_offset)
+            is_complete = target_week <= today
+            if not is_complete:
+                retention.append({
+                    "week_offset": week_offset,
+                    "active_users": None,
+                    "pct": None,
+                    "is_complete": False,
+                })
+                continue
             active_users = {
                 user_id
                 for user_id in users_in_cohort
@@ -384,6 +399,7 @@

         cohort_grid.append({
             "cohort_week": cohort_week.isoformat(),
@@ -394,22 +410,26 @@
     curves = []
     for days in RETENTION_DAYS:
         returned_users = 0
+        matured_active_dates = []
+        maturity_cutoff = today - timedelta(days=days)
         for active_dates in active_dates_by_user.values():
             if not active_dates:
                 continue
             first_active = min(active_dates)
+            if first_active > maturity_cutoff:

                 returned_users += 1
         curves.append({
             "key": f"d{days}",
             "label": f"D{days}",
             "days": days,

     dau_series = []

         feedback = metadata.get("cancel_feedback") or metadata.get("feedback")
     return {
         "id": str(_row_value(row, "id")),
-        "user_id": str(_row_value(row, "user_id")),

         "to_plan": str(_row_value(row, "to_plan") or ""),
         "reason": str(reason) if reason else None,
@@ -571,6 +590,77 @@
     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1
 
     reason_buckets = [
         {

+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

codex
实现层已补：留存 cell 加完整性标记/null，Dn 用成熟分母，churn bucket 加 uncategorized，cancel reason 去掉 user_id，消息信号抽成 session 配对 helper，两个 activity day 查询改 UTC 截断，并加 messages 复合索引迁移。现在跑 targeted pytest 看回归点。

+"""add messages role-created-session index
+
+Revision ID: 20260524_0031
+Revises: 20260514_0030
+Create Date: 2026-05-24
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:
+    op.drop_index("idx_messages_role_created_session", table_name="messages")

 }
 EXPORT_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(export|download|csv|excel|xlsx)\b|导出|下载|表格文件", re.IGNORECASE)
 PAGE_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(page|p\.\s*\d+|page\s+\d+)\b|第\s*\d+\s*页|页面", re.IGNORECASE)
@@ -234,6 +235,10 @@
     return day - timedelta(days=day.weekday())
 
 
+def _utc_day_trunc(column: Any) -> Any:
+    return func.date_trunc("day", column.op("AT TIME ZONE")("UTC"))
+
+
 def _admin_excluded_emails(admin_emails: set[str] | None = None) -> set[str]:
     if admin_emails is not None:
         return {email.strip().lower() for email in admin_emails if email and email.strip()}
@@ -369,12 +374,22 @@
         user_id: {_week_start(active_date) for active_date in active_dates}
         for user_id, active_dates in active_dates_by_user.items()
     }
+    today = now.date()
     cohort_grid = []
     for cohort_week in cohort_weeks:
         users_in_cohort = cohort_users[cohort_week]
         retention = []
         for week_offset in range(RETENTION_OFFSETS):
             target_week = cohort_week + timedelta(weeks=week_offset)
+            is_complete = target_week <= today
+            if not is_complete:
+                retention.append({
+                    "week_offset": week_offset,
+                    "active_users": None,
+                    "pct": None,
+                    "is_complete": False,

     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1

         {

+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

+"""add messages role-created-session index
+
+Revision ID: 20260524_0031
+Revises: 20260514_0030
+Create Date: 2026-05-24
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:

     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1

+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+

+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

codex
Ruff 只报了 churn 测试 import 排序；我会手动修。并行跑的 `compileall` 不是用户要求项，macOS 用户缓存写入被 sandbox 拦住了，不影响 pytest/ruff 验证路径。

+"""add messages role-created-session index

+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@

         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:

+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

     assert payload["dau_wau_mau"]["mau"] == 2
+
+
+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

+"""add messages role-created-session index
+
+Revision ID: 20260524_0031
+Revises: 20260514_0030
+Create Date: 2026-05-24
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:
+    op.drop_index("idx_messages_role_created_session", table_name="messages")

 EXPORT_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(export|download|csv|excel|xlsx)\b|导出|下载|表格文件", re.IGNORECASE)
 PAGE_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(page|p\.\s*\d+|page\s+\d+)\b|第\s*\d+\s*页|页面", re.IGNORECASE)

+def _utc_day_trunc(column: Any) -> Any:
+    return func.date_trunc("day", column.op("AT TIME ZONE")("UTC"))
+
+

     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1

+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1
