+
+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1

+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

     assert payload["dau_wau_mau"]["mau"] == 2
+
+
+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7a2b7c339e4c8ecf19c0b7fdf410930e7bd0660d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/backend/alembic/versions/20260524_0031_add_messages_role_created_session_index.py

+"""add messages role-created-session index
+
+Revision ID: 20260524_0031
+Revises: 20260514_0030
+Create Date: 2026-05-24
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:
+    op.drop_index("idx_messages_role_created_session", table_name="messages")

 }
 EXPORT_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(export|download|csv|excel|xlsx)\b|导出|下载|表格文件", re.IGNORECASE)
 PAGE_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(page|p\.\s*\d+|page\s+\d+)\b|第\s*\d+\s*页|页面", re.IGNORECASE)
@@ -234,6 +235,10 @@
     return day - timedelta(days=day.weekday())
 
 
+def _utc_day_trunc(column: Any) -> Any:
+    return func.date_trunc("day", column.op("AT TIME ZONE")("UTC"))
+
+
 def _admin_excluded_emails(admin_emails: set[str] | None = None) -> set[str]:

         return {email.strip().lower() for email in admin_emails if email and email.strip()}

     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1
 
     reason_buckets = [
         {
@@ -1573,7 +1665,7 @@

+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

   148	def _humanize_code(value: str | None) -> str | None:
   149	    if not value:
   150	        return None
   151	    text_value = str(value).replace("_", " ").replace("-", " ").strip()
   152	    if not text_value:
   153	        return None
   154	    return text_value[:1].upper() + text_value[1:]
   155	
   156	
   157	def _paid_signal_label(event_name: str | None) -> str:
   158	    return PAID_SIGNAL_LABELS.get(str(event_name or ""), _humanize_code(event_name) or "Paid signal")
   159	
   160	
   161	def _paid_signal_description(
   162	    event_name: str | None,
   163	    reason: str | None,
   164	    source: str | None,
   165	    plan: str | None,
   166	) -> str:
   167	    source_label = PAID_SOURCE_LABELS.get(str(source or ""), _humanize_code(source))
   168	    reason_label = PAID_REASON_LABELS.get(str(reason or "").lower(), _humanize_code(reason))
   169	    pieces: list[str] = []
   170	    if event_name == "upgrade_nudge_shown":
   171	        pieces.append("Non-blocking upgrade reminder.")
   172	    elif event_name == "paywall_opened":
   173	        pieces.append("A blocking upgrade prompt was shown.")
   174	    elif event_name == "limit_hit":
   175	        pieces.append("The user tried something their current plan does not allow.")
   176	    if reason_label:
   177	        pieces.append(f"Reason: {reason_label}.")
   178	    if source_label:
   179	        pieces.append(f"Surface: {source_label}.")
   180	    if plan:
   181	        pieces.append(f"Target plan: {str(plan).upper()}.")
   182	    return " ".join(pieces) or _paid_signal_label(event_name)
   183	
   184	
   185	def _paid_intent_payload(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
   186	    event_name = str(row.event_name or "")
   187	    return {
   188	        "event_name": event_name,
   189	        "reason": row.reason,
   190	        "source": row.source,
   191	        "plan": row.plan,
   192	        "label": _paid_signal_label(event_name),
   193	        "description": _paid_signal_description(event_name, row.reason, row.source, row.plan),

   195	        "users": int(row.users or 0),
   196	    }
   197	
   198	
   199	def _rate(numerator: int | float, denominator: int | float) -> float:

   201	
   202	
   203	def _delta_payload(current: int | float, previous: int | float) -> dict[str, int | float | None]:

   206	        "current": current,

   598	def _derive_message_diagnostics(
   599	    message_rows: list[Any],
   600	    *,
   601	    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
   602	) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
   603	    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
   604	        "rag_miss": set(),
   605	        "export_refusal": set(),
   606	        "page_fail": set(),
   607	        "capability_refusal": set(),
   608	    }
   609	    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
   610	    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
   611	    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
   612	
   613	    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
   614	        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
   615	        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
   616	            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   617	        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
   618	
   619	    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
   620	        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
   621	        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
   622	        role = _row_value(row, "role")
   623	        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
   624	        category = "user_message"
   625	
   626	        if role == "user":
   627	            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
   628	            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
   629	                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
   630	            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
   631	                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
   632	            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
   633	                category = "asst_zero"
   634	        elif role == "assistant":
   635	            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
   636	            if is_rag_miss:
   637	                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
   638	                category = "rag_miss"
   639	            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
   640	                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
   641	                category = "capability_refusal"
   642	            else:
   643	                category = "normal_answer"
   644	
   645	            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
   646	            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
   647	                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
   648	
   649	            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
   650	            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
   651	                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
   652	
   653	        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
   654	            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
   655	            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
   656	                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
   657	
   658	    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
   659	        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
   660	
   661	    return signal_users, final_candidates

   664	def _build_churn_payload(
   665	    *,
   666	    now: datetime,
   667	    users: list[Any],
   668	    activity_days: list[Any],
   669	    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]],
   670	    last_actions: list[Any],
   671	    feedback_rows: list[Any],
   672	    cancel_rows: list[Any],
   673	    inactive_days: int = 14,
   674	    excluded_user_ids: set[str] | None = None,
   675	    admin_emails: set[str] | None = None,
   676	) -> dict[str, Any]:
   677	    eligible_users = _eligible_user_map(users, excluded_user_ids, admin_emails)
   678	    eligible_user_ids = set(eligible_users)
   679	    active_dates_by_user = _activity_dates_by_user(activity_days, eligible_user_ids)
   680	    activated_user_ids = {user_id for user_id, dates in active_dates_by_user.items() if dates}
   681	    inactive_cutoff = (now - timedelta(days=inactive_days)).date()
   682	    churned_user_ids = {
   683	        user_id
   684	        for user_id, dates in active_dates_by_user.items()
   685	        if dates and max(dates) < inactive_cutoff
   686	    }
   687	    one_and_done_user_ids = {
   688	        user_id for user_id, dates in active_dates_by_user.items() if len(dates) == 1
   689	    }
   690	
   691	    one_and_done = {
   692	        "activated_users": len(activated_user_ids),
   693	        "count": len(one_and_done_user_ids),
   694	        "pct": _rate(len(one_and_done_user_ids), len(activated_user_ids)),
   695	    }
   696	    normalized_signals = {
   697	        key: _coerce_user_set(value, eligible_user_ids)
   698	        for key, value in signal_users.items()
   699	    }
   700	    churn_signals = []
   701	    for key in CHURN_SIGNAL_KEYS:
   702	        users_with_signal = normalized_signals.get(key, set()) & churned_user_ids
   703	        churn_signals.append({
   704	            "key": key,
   705	            "label": CHURN_SIGNAL_LABELS[key],
   706	            "count": len(users_with_signal),
   707	            "pct": _rate(len(users_with_signal), len(churned_user_ids)),
   708	        })
   709	
   710	    last_action_counts: Counter[str] = Counter()
   711	    for row in last_actions:
   712	        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
   713	        if user_id not in churned_user_ids:
   714	            continue
   715	        category = str(_row_value(row, "category") or "unknown").replace("-", "_")
   716	        last_action_counts[category] += 1
   717	    last_action = [
   718	        {
   719	            "key": key,
   720	            "label": _normalized_action_label(key),
   721	            "count": count,
   722	            "pct": _rate(count, len(churned_user_ids)),
   723	        }
   724	        for key, count in sorted(last_action_counts.items(), key=lambda item: (-item[1], item[0]))
   725	    ]
   726	
   727	    eligible_feedback = [
   728	        row for row in feedback_rows
   729	        if str(_row_value(row, "user_id")) in eligible_user_ids
   730	    ]

  1636	@router.get("/retention", response_model=AdminRetentionResponse)
  1637	async def admin_retention(
  1638	    _admin: User = Depends(require_admin),
  1639	    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session),
  1640	):
  1641	    """Retention analytics centered on user-role chat message activity."""
  1642	    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
  1643	    current_week = _week_start(now)
  1644	    cohort_cutoff = datetime.combine(
  1645	        current_week - timedelta(weeks=RETENTION_WEEKS - 1),
  1646	        datetime.min.time(),
  1647	        tzinfo=timezone.utc,
  1648	    )
  1649	    activity_cutoff = now - timedelta(days=RETENTION_LOOKBACK_DAYS)
  1650	
  1651	    activity_user_ids = (
  1652	        select(ChatSession.user_id.label("user_id"))
  1653	        .select_from(Message)
  1654	        .join(ChatSession, Message.session_id == ChatSession.id)
  1655	        .where(Message.role == "user")
  1656	        .where(Message.created_at >= activity_cutoff)
  1657	        .where(ChatSession.user_id.is_not(None))
  1658	        .subquery()
  1659	    )
  1660	    user_rows = (
  1661	        await db.execute(
  1662	            select(User.id, User.email, User.created_at, User.plan)
  1663	            .where(or_(User.created_at >= cohort_cutoff, User.id.in_(select(activity_user_ids.c.user_id))))
  1664	            .where(*_eligible_user_conditions())
  1665	        )
  1666	    ).all()
  1667	
  1668	    activity_day = _utc_day_trunc(Message.created_at).label("activity_date")
  1669	    activity_rows = (
  1670	        await db.execute(
  1671	            select(ChatSession.user_id.label("user_id"), activity_day)
  1672	            .select_from(Message)
  1673	            .join(ChatSession, Message.session_id == ChatSession.id)
  1674	            .join(User, User.id == ChatSession.user_id)
  1675	            .where(Message.role == "user")
  1676	            .where(Message.created_at >= activity_cutoff)
  1677	            .where(ChatSession.user_id.is_not(None))
  1678	            .where(*_eligible_user_conditions())
  1679	            .group_by(ChatSession.user_id, activity_day)
  1680	        )
  1681	    ).all()
  1682	
  1683	    document_rows = (
  1684	        await db.execute(
  1685	            select(
  1686	                Document.user_id.label("user_id"),
  1687	                func.max(Document.page_count).label("max_page_count"),
  1688	            )
  1689	            .select_from(Document)
  1690	            .join(User, User.id == Document.user_id)
  1691	            .where(Document.created_at >= activity_cutoff)
  1692	            .where(Document.user_id.is_not(None))
  1693	            .where(Document.demo_slug.is_(None))
  1694	            .where(*_eligible_user_conditions())
  1695	            .group_by(Document.user_id)
  1696	        )
  1697	    ).all()
  1698	
  1699	    locale_rows = (
  1700	        await db.execute(
  1701	            select(UserFeedback.user_id.label("user_id"), func.max(UserFeedback.locale).label("locale"))
  1702	            .select_from(UserFeedback)
  1703	            .join(User, User.id == UserFeedback.user_id)
  1704	            .where(UserFeedback.created_at >= activity_cutoff)
  1705	            .where(UserFeedback.user_id.is_not(None))
  1706	            .where(UserFeedback.locale.is_not(None))
  1707	            .where(*_eligible_user_conditions())
  1708	            .group_by(UserFeedback.user_id)
  1709	        )
  1710	    ).all()
  1711	
  1712	    return _build_retention_payload(
  1713	        now=now,
  1714	        users=list(user_rows),
  1715	        activity_days=list(activity_rows),
  1716	        document_segments=list(document_rows),
  1717	        locale_segments=list(locale_rows),
  1718	    )
  1719	
  1720	
  1721	@router.get("/churn", response_model=AdminChurnResponse)
  1722	async def admin_churn(
  1723	    _admin: User = Depends(require_admin),
  1724	    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session),
  1725	    inactive_days: int = Query(14, ge=1, le=90),
  1726	):
  1727	    """Churn diagnostics for activated users without recent user-message activity."""
  1728	    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
  1729	    activity_cutoff = now - timedelta(days=CHURN_LOOKBACK_DAYS)
  1730	
  1731	    activity_user_ids = (
  1732	        select(ChatSession.user_id.label("user_id"))
  1733	        .select_from(Message)
  1734	        .join(ChatSession, Message.session_id == ChatSession.id)
  1735	        .where(Message.role == "user")
  1736	        .where(Message.created_at >= activity_cutoff)
  1737	        .where(ChatSession.user_id.is_not(None))
  1738	        .subquery()
  1739	    )
  1740	    user_rows = (
  1741	        await db.execute(
  1742	            select(User.id, User.email, User.created_at, User.plan)
  1743	            .where(User.id.in_(select(activity_user_ids.c.user_id)))
  1744	            .where(*_eligible_user_conditions())
  1745	        )
  1746	    ).all()
  1747	
  1748	    activity_day = _utc_day_trunc(Message.created_at).label("activity_date")
  1749	    activity_rows = (
  1750	        await db.execute(
  1751	            select(ChatSession.user_id.label("user_id"), activity_day)
  1752	            .select_from(Message)
  1753	            .join(ChatSession, Message.session_id == ChatSession.id)
  1754	            .join(User, User.id == ChatSession.user_id)
  1755	            .where(Message.role == "user")
  1756	            .where(Message.created_at >= activity_cutoff)

new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7a2b7c339e4c8ecf19c0b7fdf410930e7bd0660d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/backend/alembic/versions/20260524_0031_add_messages_role_created_session_index.py
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+"""add messages role-created-session index
+
+Revision ID: 20260524_0031
+Revises: 20260514_0030
+Create Date: 2026-05-24
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:
+    op.drop_index("idx_messages_role_created_session", table_name="messages")

 EXPORT_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(export|download|csv|excel|xlsx)\b|导出|下载|表格文件", re.IGNORECASE)
 PAGE_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(page|p\.\s*\d+|page\s+\d+)\b|第\s*\d+\s*页|页面", re.IGNORECASE)

+def _utc_day_trunc(column: Any) -> Any:
+    return func.date_trunc("day", column.op("AT TIME ZONE")("UTC"))
+
+
 def _admin_excluded_emails(admin_emails: set[str] | None = None) -> set[str]:

     curves = []

                 continue

@@ -571,6 +590,77 @@
     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1

     assert feedback["by_severity"] == [{"key": "high", "count": 1}]

+    assert "user_id" not in payload["cancel_reasons"][0]
     last_action = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["last_action"]}
     assert last_action["asst_zero"]["count"] == 1

     assert "paywall" not in last_action
+
+
+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

+    assert may_4_cohort["retention"][1] == {
+        "week_offset": 1,
+        "active_users": 1,
+        "pct": 0.5,
+        "is_complete": True,
+    }
 
+    current_cohort = next(row for row in payload["cohort_grid"] if row["cohort_week"] == "2026-06-15")
+    assert current_cohort["retention"][0] == {
+        "week_offset": 0,
+        "active_users": None,
+        "pct": None,
+        "is_complete": False,
+    }
+    assert current_cohort["retention"][1] == {
+        "week_offset": 1,
+        "active_users": None,
+        "pct": None,
+        "is_complete": False,
+    }
+
     curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
     assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 3
     assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 1
@@ -86,3 +112,55 @@
     assert doc_segments["large"]["users"] == 1
 
     assert payload["dau_wau_mau"]["mau"] == 2
+
+
+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

+"""add messages role-created-session index
+

+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:
+    op.drop_index("idx_messages_role_created_session", table_name="messages")

+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1

         {

     assert "paywall" not in last_action
+
+
+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

+
+
+def test_admin_retention_curves_only_count_matured_users_in_denominator() -> None:
+    now = datetime(2026, 6, 15, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    users = [
+        _row(id="u_old", email="old@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_recent", email="recent@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 10, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+        _row(id="u_today", email="today@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 6, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
+    ]
+    activity_days = [
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 8)),
+        _row(user_id="u_old", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 31)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
+        _row(user_id="u_recent", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 11)),
+        _row(user_id="u_today", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 15)),
+    ]
+
+    payload = admin_api._build_retention_payload(
+        now=now,
+        users=users,
+        activity_days=activity_days,
+        document_segments=[],
+        locale_segments=[],
+        excluded_user_ids=set(),
+        admin_emails=set(),
+    )
+
+    curves = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["curves"]}
+    assert curves["d1"]["activated_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["returned_users"] == 2
+    assert curves["d1"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d7"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d7"]["pct"] == 1.0
+    assert curves["d30"]["activated_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["returned_users"] == 1
+    assert curves["d30"]["pct"] == 1.0
+
+
+def test_admin_activity_day_expression_truncates_in_utc() -> None:
+    expression = admin_api._utc_day_trunc(admin_api.Message.created_at)
+
+    compiled = str(
+        expression.compile(
+            dialect=postgresql.dialect(),
+            compile_kwargs={"literal_binds": True},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "date_trunc('day', messages.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')" in compiled

    27	        _row(id="u5", email="u5@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
    28	        _row(id="u6", email="u6@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="free"),
    29	        _row(id=owner_id, email="owner@example.com", created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc), plan="pro"),
    30	    ]
    31	    activity_days = [
    32	        _row(user_id="u1", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),

    34	        _row(user_id="u2", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
    35	        _row(user_id="u3", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
    36	        _row(user_id="u3", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 15)),
    37	        _row(user_id="u4", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
    38	        _row(user_id="u4", activity_date=date(2026, 6, 10)),
    39	        _row(user_id="u5", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
    40	        _row(user_id="u5", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 2)),
    41	        _row(user_id="u6", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
    42	        _row(user_id="u6", activity_date=date(2026, 5, 3)),
    43	        _row(user_id=owner_id, activity_date=date(2026, 5, 1)),
    44	    ]
    45	    signal_users = {
    46	        "asst_zero": {"u1", owner_id},
    47	        "rag_miss": {"u2"},
    48	        "parse_failure": {"u5", owner_id},
    49	        "large_doc": {"u5"},
    50	        "export_refusal": {"u3"},
    51	        "paywall_hit": {owner_id},
    52	        "page_fail": {"u2"},
    53	        "capability_refusal": set(),
    54	    }
    55	    last_actions = [
    56	        _row(user_id="u1", category="asst_zero"),
    57	        _row(user_id="u2", category="rag_miss"),
    58	        _row(user_id="u3", category="upload"),
    59	        _row(user_id="u4", category="normal_answer"),
    60	        _row(user_id="u5", category="upload"),
    61	        _row(user_id=owner_id, category="paywall"),
    62	    ]
    63	    feedback_rows = [
    64	        _row(
    65	            id="fb1",
    66	            user_id="u2",
    67	            type="answer_quality",
    68	            area="chat_answer",
    69	            severity="high",
    70	            message="Citation was not in the document.",
    71	            plan="free",
    72	            created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 3, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
    73	        ),
    74	        _row(
    75	            id="fb-owner",
    76	            user_id=owner_id,
    77	            type="bug",
    78	            area="upload_parse",
    79	            severity="blocking",
    80	            message="Owner-only feedback should be excluded.",
    81	            plan="pro",
    82	            created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 4, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
    83	        ),
    84	    ]
    85	    cancel_rows = [
    86	        _row(
    87	            id="pt1",
    88	            user_id="u3",
    89	            from_plan="plus",
    90	            to_plan="free",
    91	            reason="missing_export",
    92	            feedback="Needed CSV export.",
    93	            created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 16, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
    94	        )
    95	    ]
    96	
    97	    payload = admin_api._build_churn_payload(
    98	        now=now,
    99	        users=users,
   100	        activity_days=activity_days,
   101	        signal_users=signal_users,
   102	        last_actions=last_actions,
   103	        feedback_rows=feedback_rows,
   104	        cancel_rows=cancel_rows,
   105	        inactive_days=14,
   106	        excluded_user_ids={owner_id},
   107	        admin_emails={"owner@example.com"},
   108	    )
   109	
   110	    assert payload["one_and_done"] == {"activated_users": 6, "count": 1, "pct": 0.1667}
   111	
   112	    signals = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["churn_signals"]}
   113	    assert signals["asst_zero"]["count"] == 1
   114	    assert signals["asst_zero"]["pct"] == 0.2
   115	    assert signals["rag_miss"]["count"] == 1
   116	    assert signals["parse_failure"]["count"] == 1
   117	    assert signals["large_doc"]["count"] == 1
   118	    assert signals["export_refusal"]["count"] == 1
   119	    assert signals["paywall_hit"]["count"] == 0
   120	
   121	    buckets = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["reason_buckets"]}
   122	    assert buckets["one_off_success"]["count"] == 1
   123	    assert buckets["page_fail"]["count"] == 1
   124	    assert buckets["export"]["count"] == 1
   125	    assert buckets["parse"]["count"] == 1
   126	    assert buckets["uncategorized"]["count"] == 1
   127	    assert sum(row["count"] for row in buckets.values()) == payload["churned_users"]
   128	    assert sum(row["pct"] for row in buckets.values()) == 1.0
   129	
   130	    feedback = payload["feedback"]
   131	    assert feedback["recent"][0]["id"] == "fb1"
   132	    assert feedback["by_area"] == [{"key": "chat_answer", "count": 1}]
   133	    assert feedback["by_severity"] == [{"key": "high", "count": 1}]
   134	
   135	    assert payload["cancel_reasons"][0]["reason"] == "missing_export"
   136	    assert "user_id" not in payload["cancel_reasons"][0]
   137	    last_action = {row["key"]: row for row in payload["last_action"]}
   138	    assert last_action["asst_zero"]["count"] == 1
   139	    assert last_action["rag_miss"]["count"] == 1
   140	    assert "paywall" not in last_action
   141	
   142	
   143	def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
   144	    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   145	    message_rows = [
   146	        _row(
   147	            user_id="u_export_refused",
   148	            session_id="s-export-refused",
   149	            role="user",
   150	            content="Export this chat to csv",
   151	            citations=None,
   152	            metadata_json={},
   153	            created_at=base,
   154	        ),
   155	        _row(
   156	            user_id="u_export_refused",
   157	            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
   158	            role="assistant",
   159	            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
   160	            citations=[],
   161	            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
   162	            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
   163	        ),
   164	        _row(
   165	            user_id="u_export_success",
   166	            session_id="s-export-success",
   167	            role="user",
   168	            content="download an xlsx",
   169	            citations=None,
   170	            metadata_json={},
   171	            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
   172	        ),
   173	        _row(
   174	            user_id="u_export_success",
   175	            session_id="s-export-success",
   176	            role="assistant",
   177	            content="Created it.",
   178	            citations=[],
   179	            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
   180	            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
   181	        ),
   182	        _row(
   183	            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
   184	            session_id="s-page-ok",
   185	            role="user",
   186	            content="What is on page 3?",
   187	            citations=None,
   188	            metadata_json={},
   189	            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
   190	        ),
   191	        _row(
   192	            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
   193	            session_id="s-page-ok",
   194	            role="assistant",
   195	            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
   196	            citations=[{"page": 3}],
   197	            metadata_json={},
   198	            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
   199	        ),
   200	        _row(
   201	            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
   202	            session_id="s-page-ok",
   203	            role="assistant",
   204	            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
   205	            citations=[],
   206	            metadata_json={},
   207	            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
   208	        ),
   209	        _row(
   210	            user_id="u_page_failed",
   211	            session_id="s-page-fail",
   212	            role="user",
   213	            content="Show page 9",
   214	            citations=None,
   215	            metadata_json={},
   216	            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
   217	        ),
   218	        _row(
   219	            user_id="u_page_failed",
   220	            session_id="s-page-fail",
   221	            role="assistant",
   222	            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
   223	            citations=[],
   224	            metadata_json={},
   225	            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
   226	        ),
   227	    ]
   228	
   229	    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
   230	        message_rows,
   231	        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
   232	    )
   233	
   234	    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
   235	    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
   236	    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
   237	    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
   238	    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
   239	    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"

new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..7a2b7c339e4c8ecf19c0b7fdf410930e7bd0660d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/backend/alembic/versions/20260524_0031_add_messages_role_created_session_index.py
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+"""add messages role-created-session index
+
+Revision ID: 20260524_0031
+Revises: 20260514_0030
+Create Date: 2026-05-24
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from alembic import op
+
+
+revision = "20260524_0031"
+down_revision = "20260514_0030"
+branch_labels = None
+depends_on = None
+
+
+def upgrade() -> None:
+    op.create_index(
+        "idx_messages_role_created_session",
+        "messages",
+        ["role", "created_at", "session_id"],
+        unique=False,
+    )
+
+
+def downgrade() -> None:
+    op.drop_index("idx_messages_role_created_session", table_name="messages")

     "parse": "Parse failure",
     "capability_refusal": "Capability refusal",

 }
 EXPORT_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(export|download|csv|excel|xlsx)\b|导出|下载|表格文件", re.IGNORECASE)
 PAGE_REQUEST_RE = re.compile(r"\b(page|p\.\s*\d+|page\s+\d+)\b|第\s*\d+\s*页|页面", re.IGNORECASE)
@@ -234,6 +235,10 @@
     return day - timedelta(days=day.weekday())
 
 
+def _utc_day_trunc(column: Any) -> Any:
+    return func.date_trunc("day", column.op("AT TIME ZONE")("UTC"))
+
+
 def _admin_excluded_emails(admin_emails: set[str] | None = None) -> set[str]:
     if admin_emails is not None:
         return {email.strip().lower() for email in admin_emails if email and email.strip()}

@@ -394,22 +410,26 @@
     curves = []
     for days in RETENTION_DAYS:
         returned_users = 0
+        matured_active_dates = []

         for active_dates in active_dates_by_user.values():
             if not active_dates:
                 continue
             first_active = min(active_dates)
+            if first_active > maturity_cutoff:
+                continue

         curves.append({

         "to_plan": str(_row_value(row, "to_plan") or ""),

@@ -571,6 +590,77 @@
     }
 
 
+def _message_is_rag_miss(row: Any) -> bool:
+    content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+    return _citations_empty(_row_value(row, "citations")) or bool(RAG_MISS_RE.search(content))
+
+
+def _derive_message_diagnostics(
+    message_rows: list[Any],
+    *,
+    asst_zero_session_ids: set[str],
+) -> tuple[dict[str, set[str]], dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]]]:
+    signal_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {
+        "rag_miss": set(),
+        "export_refusal": set(),
+        "page_fail": set(),
+        "capability_refusal": set(),
+    }
+    final_candidates: dict[str, tuple[datetime, str]] = {}
+    pending_export_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+    pending_page_by_session: dict[str, set[str]] = defaultdict(set)
+
+    def sort_key(row: Any) -> tuple[str, datetime]:
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        if not isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            created_at = datetime.min.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+        return (str(_row_value(row, "session_id") or ""), created_at)
+
+    for row in sorted(message_rows, key=sort_key):
+        user_id = str(_row_value(row, "user_id"))
+        session_id = str(_row_value(row, "session_id"))
+        role = _row_value(row, "role")
+        created_at = _row_value(row, "created_at")
+        category = "user_message"
+
+        if role == "user":
+            content = _row_value(row, "content") or ""
+            if EXPORT_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_export_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if PAGE_REQUEST_RE.search(content):
+                pending_page_by_session[session_id].add(user_id)
+            if session_id in asst_zero_session_ids:
+                category = "asst_zero"
+        elif role == "assistant":
+            is_rag_miss = _message_is_rag_miss(row)
+            if is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["rag_miss"].add(user_id)
+                category = "rag_miss"
+            elif CAPABILITY_REFUSAL_RE.search(_row_value(row, "content") or ""):
+                signal_users["capability_refusal"].add(user_id)
+                category = "capability_refusal"
+            else:
+                category = "normal_answer"
+
+            pending_export_user_ids = pending_export_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_export_user_ids and not _message_has_artifact(_row_value(row, "metadata_json")):
+                signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+            pending_page_user_ids = pending_page_by_session.pop(session_id, set())
+            if pending_page_user_ids and is_rag_miss:
+                signal_users["page_fail"].update(pending_page_user_ids)
+
+        if isinstance(created_at, datetime):
+            current = final_candidates.get(user_id)
+            if current is None or created_at > current[0]:
+                final_candidates[user_id] = (created_at, category)
+
+    for pending_export_user_ids in pending_export_by_session.values():
+        signal_users["export_refusal"].update(pending_export_user_ids)
+
+    return signal_users, final_candidates
+
+
 def _build_churn_payload(
     *,
     now: datetime,
@@ -671,6 +761,8 @@
             bucket_counts["capability_refusal"] += 1
         elif user_id in one_and_done_user_ids:
             bucket_counts["one_off_success"] += 1
+        else:
+            bucket_counts["uncategorized"] += 1

+
+def test_admin_churn_message_signals_are_paired_by_session_and_response() -> None:
+    base = datetime(2026, 5, 1, 12, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    message_rows = [
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-export-refused",
+            role="user",
+            content="Export this chat to csv",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base,
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_refused",
+            session_id="s-unrelated-artifact",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Here is an unrelated file.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=1),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="user",
+            content="download an xlsx",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=2),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_export_success",
+            session_id="s-export-success",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Created it.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={"artifact_count": 1},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=3),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="user",
+            content="What is on page 3?",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=4),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="Page 3 explains renewal terms.",
+            citations=[{"page": 3}],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=5),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_not_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-ok",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that unrelated later question.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=6),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="user",
+            content="Show page 9",
+            citations=None,
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=7),
+        ),
+        _row(
+            user_id="u_page_failed",
+            session_id="s-page-fail",
+            role="assistant",
+            content="I can't find that page in the document.",
+            citations=[],
+            metadata_json={},
+            created_at=base + timedelta(minutes=8),
+        ),
+    ]
+
+    signal_users, final_candidates = admin_api._derive_message_diagnostics(
+        message_rows,
+        asst_zero_session_ids=set(),
+    )
+
+    assert "u_export_refused" in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_export_success" not in signal_users["export_refusal"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" in signal_users["rag_miss"]
+    assert "u_page_not_failed" not in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert "u_page_failed" in signal_users["page_fail"]
+    assert final_candidates["u_page_failed"][1] == "rag_miss"
